languages.text: "Наше соглашение не подлежит пересмотру. То, что ты получишь взамен, в своей непосредственной ценности куда соразмернее твоему скоротечному существованию".

traits.locale_text: "Наше соглашение не подлежит пересмотру. То, что ты получишь взамен, в своей непосредственной ценности куда соразмернее твоему скоротечному существованию".

languages.text: "Our agreement is not subject to renegotiation. What you will receive in exchange is significantly more valuable than your own ephemeral existence."
languages.original_text: "Наше соглашение не подлежит пересмотру. То, что ты получишь взамен, в своей непосредственной ценности куда соразмернее твоему скоротечному существованию".

traits.locale_text: "Our agreement is not subject to renegotiation. What you shall receive in exchange possesses, in its immediate value, a far greater proportion to your ephemeral existence."
"Our agreement is not subject to renegotiation. What you shall receive in exchange possesses, in its immediate value, a far greater proportion to your ephemeral existence."
"Our agreement is not subject to renegotiation. What you will receive in exchange is significantly more valuable than your own ephemeral existence."
"Our agreement is not subject to renegotiation. What you will receive in exchange is significantly more valuable than your own ephemeral existence."
"Our agreement is not subject to renegotiation. What you will receive in exchange is significantly more valuable than your own ephemeral existence."

languages.text: "Unsere Vereinbarung sieht keine Nachverhandlung vor. Was du im Gegenzug erhalten wirst, ist deutlich mehr wert als deine kurzlebige Existenz."
languages.original_text: "Our agreement is not subject to renegotiation. What you will receive in exchange is significantly more valuable than your own ephemeral existence."

traits.locale_text: "Unsere Vereinbarung sieht keine Nachverhandlung vor. Was du im Gegenzug erhalten wirst, ist deutlich mehr wert als deine kurzlebige Existenz."

languages.text: “我们的交易不容再议。你换来的东西，远比你那转瞬即逝的生命有价值得多。”
languages.original_text: "Our agreement is not subject to renegotiation. What you will receive in exchange is significantly more valuable than your own ephemeral existence."

traits.locale_text: “我们的交易不容再议。你换来的东西，远比你那转瞬即逝的生命有价值得多。”

languages.text: « Notre accord ne peut pas être renégocié. Ce que vous recevrez en contrepartie aura bien plus de valeur que votre propre existence éphémère. »
languages.original_text: "Our agreement is not subject to renegotiation. What you will receive in exchange is significantly more valuable than your own ephemeral existence."

traits.locale_text: « Notre accord ne peut pas être renégocié. Ce que vous recevrez en contrepartie aura bien plus de valeur que votre propre existence éphémère. »

languages.text: «Nuestro acuerdo no es negociable. Lo que vas a recibir a cambio es significativamente más valioso que tu propia y efímera existencia».
languages.original_text: "Our agreement is not subject to renegotiation. What you will receive in exchange is significantly more valuable than your own ephemeral existence."

traits.locale_text: «Nuestro acuerdo no es negociable. Lo que vas a recibir a cambio es significativamente más valioso que tu propia y efímera existencia».

languages.text: "Anlaşmamız yeniden müzakereye açık değil. Karşılığında alacağın şey, kendi kısa ömürlü varoluşundan çok daha değerli."
languages.original_text: "Our agreement is not subject to renegotiation. What you will receive in exchange is significantly more valuable than your own ephemeral existence."

traits.locale_text: "Anlaşmamız yeniden müzakereye açık değil. Karşılığında alacağın şey, kendi kısa ömürlü varoluşundan çok daha değerli."

languages.text: 「我々の契約は再交渉の対象ではない。君が得る代償は、君自身の儚い存在よりもはるかに価値がある。」
languages.original_text: "Our agreement is not subject to renegotiation. What you will receive in exchange is significantly more valuable than your own ephemeral existence."

traits.locale_text: 「我々の契約は再交渉の対象ではない。君が得る代償は、君自身の儚い存在よりもはるかに価値がある。」
